en: so my coffee's waiting for me when I walk in.
ko: 내가 들어갈 때 커피가 기다리고 있어.

en: I f***ing love Dunkin', Dad. What are you talking about?
Where else can I get breakfast and the perfect stockings, Stefan? You want to talk real customers?
ko: 아침식사와 완벽한 선물을 어디서 더 구할 수 있어?

en: Kid, that's me. I'm like the mayor of Dunkin'.
ko: 애야, 그게 나야. 난 던킨의 시장 같아.

en: This is the face of Dunkin' Donuts right here. Hey, you can't smoke in here, man.
I'm not, Mark. I'm not smoking in here. You're smoking in here. I'm just a customer.
I'm the one who grabs the whizzes. Yeah, I come down to Dunkin' every day.
ko: 겨울이 다가오고 있어. 매일 던킨에 가.

en: Grab a cruller, have an extra lodge, three pile of mints, take a big dump. That's kind of the routine.
I'll get my seat right over there. This douchebag will move when I'm ready.
And with Dunkin' Rewards app, there's even more reason to celebrate the season.
Yo, free coffee! I got the big one. I got a free coffee right there on the app.
ko: 야, 무료 커피! 큰 걸로 받았어.

en: You doing a little show-and-tell or something, huh? With a little show-and-tell, Dunkin' nuts.
ko: 쇼 앤 텔 같은 거? 응?

en: Show that, mama. Tis the season for holiday drinks.
Like our mint... Never mind that. Hey, interview my buddy Dewey for the movie right here.
ko: 이 영화에 내 친구 듀이를 인터뷰해줘.

en: Dewey, tell me your favorite donut is. I don't want to be in there. Come on, pal.
ko: 듀이, 네가 가장 좋아하는 도넛이 뭐야?

en: It's a movie. Tell me what your favorite is. How you like the vanilla nut taps.
What? The vanilla nut taps. Oh, don't! Don't!
